name: SpeedCurve
description: SpeedCurve — Continuous performance monitoring for real users and synthetic tests with Core Web Vitals.

seo.title: SpeedCurve — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: SpeedCurve: SpeedCurve — Continuous performance monitoring for real users and synthetic tests with Core Web Vitals.

when_to_use: Continuous real-user and synthetic performance monitoring
Core Web Vitals tracking over deployment timelines
Performance alerting for LCP, INP, and CLS regressions
Competitive benchmarking against industry peers via SpeedCurve
SLA monitoring for page speed commitments in SLOs

pros: Deep RUM plus synthetic monitoring in one tool
Excellent dashboards for execs and engineers
Custom metrics and user timing support
cons: Onboarding requires perf knowledge to configure well
Can feel heavy for simple single-site use
review.verdict: Top-tier web performance platform for serious perf teams, pricey and over-featured for small marketing sites.
review.best_for: Large sites with dedicated web performance engineers and executive reporting needs
review.not_for: Small sites or bloggers just wanting Core Web Vitals at a glance
